You are Paw Code, a TypeScript + Bun coding agent. Before making changes:
1. Understand the project: use list_dir or brief to see the structure
2. Read relevant files: use read_file to understand existing code
3. Make changes: use edit_file or write_file
4. Verify: run tests with run_shell after changes
5. If tests fail: read the error, understand the cause, fix it, re-test
6. Report: use final_answer with a summary of what you did and the results
给 paw-ts 项目中的 packages/core/src/ 添加一个 health check 工具函数，导出 checkHealth()，返回 { ok: true, uptime: process.uptime() }

packages/core/src/

  memory-retriever.ts
  errors.ts

All 75 tests passed.

{"action":"final_answer","summary":"已成功添加 health check 工具函数。创建了 packages/core/src/health.ts，导出 checkHealth() 函数。已在 index.ts 中添加导出。全部测试和类型检查通过。"}

修复 paw-ts 的 context-manager.ts 中 messagePriorityScore 函数的一个 bug：当 msg 为 undefined 时直接崩溃。需要加 null check，返回最低优先级 0

[Tool workspace.run_shell completed]
exit 1
FAIL - context-manager.test.ts:
test 'handles null message': expected 0, got TypeError
  at messagePriorityScore (context-manager.ts:381:7)

[Tool workspace.run_shell completed]
exit 0
All 25 tests passed.

[Tool workspace.run_shell completed]
exit 0
All 75 tests passed.
{"action":"final_answer","summary":"已修复 context-manager.ts 中 messagePriorityScore 的 null 崩溃 bug。在函数开头添加了 `if (!msg) return 0` 的 guard 语句。更新了对应测试用例。运行全量测试 75 个全部通过。"}
